action.reasoning: Observation: Iter5 iCaRL with linear classifier achieved 0.4655 avg accuracy, with worst task 0.297 and task_9 0.765, showing heavy forgetting. Analysis: iCaRL paper uses Nearest-Mean-of-Exemplars (NME) at test time instead of the softmax classifier, which drastically reduces forgetting. Decision: Implement NME classifier in predict.py using stored class means computed from exemplars, and evaluate during training based on NME accuracy to select best checkpoint. Retain current training (200 exemplars, 20 epochs/task, distillation, herding) and submit eval to measure gain. If successful, later increase epochs/ exemplars.
